narrative.headline: What 2020 Volkswagen Passat owners complain about most
narrative.summary: Owners filed 15 complaints with NHTSA for the 2020 Passat. Engine and air bag issues are tied at the top, each making up 27% of reports, followed by forward collision avoidance at 20%. One air bag report involved a crash with one person injured; no fires or deaths were reported.
